name: meta-skill
description: Discover, analyze, translate, and explain all installed AI coding assistant skills. Scan your environment, understand what each skill does, and when to use it. Supports Chinese (zh_CN) localization.

interface.shortDescription: Discover and understand all your installed AI coding skills with Chinese localization
interface.longDescription: Scan your system for all installed AI coding assistant skills (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Gemini, Trae, CherryStudio). Understand what each skill does, which app it belongs to, and when to use it. Full Chinese (zh_CN) translation support.
defaultPrompt: What skills do I have installed?
帮我看看 superpowers 里面有哪些技能
What does the TDD skill do?
